_source: IHKE3308S02 (處置/手術 detail) — single-row NHI response shape
_note: Inpatient case: admit 103/09/23, discharge 103/09/26 (range encoded in main_tit). The actual procedure execution date lives on sp_IHKE3308S04_data_list[].exe_S_DATE — in this case 103/09/23 (same as admission), but the field semantically IS the performed-date and would differ for procedures done mid-stay. row_ID matches the inpatient entry in ihke3301s05-procedures.json fixture to make the list→detail round-trip explicit. No PII in this payload (op_CODE + icd9cm_CODE are public billing codes; hospital names already appear in other fixtures). Sanitized 2026-06-12: dates year-shifted per file, provider/contact identifiers replaced with synthetics — rows are to be treated as fully synthetic.

op_CODE_CNAME: 08B53ZZ/經皮左側玻璃體部分切除術||08B53ZZ/Excision of Left Vitreous, Percutaneous Approach
